executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: The system-level ownership and self-certification drift was repaired this run, but the marketing full-contract loop remains truthfully red: its runner bundle is still failing, its momentum watchdog is still needs_attention, and its independent verifier still fails closed.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Repair the marketing owner loop itself: restore real Reddit research input or an equivalent search path, execute the pending distribution/repetition repairs, and do not claim recovery until a fresh marketing independent-verification artifact passes.

relevant_live_jobs_checked: Push research findings to git repo

findings.title: Marketing full-contract loop is still genuinely red, and the checker now truthfully fails instead of self-certifying over it
findings.mechanism: The runner bundle still returns ok=false because reddit_monitor.py is failing with search_provider_degraded, the momentum watchdog still reports needs_attention, and the independent verifier still fails closed. The checker gate was tightened this run so it now fails on those facts instead of printing MARKETING_LOOP_OK.
findings.root_cause: The marketing owner path is still not converting failing signals into repaired outcomes, and its research input path is currently degraded enough to block fresh Reddit opportunity discovery.
findings.recommended_fix: Repair the marketing owner loop itself: restore usable research/search coverage, execute the pending distribution and anti-repetition repairs, and require a fresh passing marketing independent-verification artifact before calling that path healthy.

findings.title: Architecture-scoped Gateway jobs had drifted outside the runtime registry and monitor coverage
findings.mechanism: Several enabled system-owned jobs were live in Gateway but were not explicitly owned in self_improvement_loops.json, which weakens ownership boundaries and lets live topology slip past registry-based audits. This run repaired that drift and added a durable registry-coverage invariant.
findings.root_cause: The runtime gained active support and marketing jobs faster than the watchdog registry and monitor key-job list were updated.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the registry as live truth for architecture-scoped jobs, and keep the loop-integrity coverage gate fail-closed so future active jobs cannot quietly bypass ownership accounting.

findings.title: Learning promotion improved this run: the watchdog finding became runtime-enforced behavior instead of staying a prose-only note
findings.mechanism: The ownership-drift and fake-green findings were not left in markdown; they were promoted into code by expanding KEY_JOBS, making the registry explicit, and hardening the marketing checker and loop-integrity audit.
findings.root_cause: Previous audits identified drift and self-certification risks, but the guardrails were still too weak until this run translated them into executable checks.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue converting repeated audit findings into fail-closed runtime gates, especially anywhere a checker can still say OK while a runner bundle or verifier artifact is red.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair the marketing research/execution path until the marketing full-contract loop can earn a real pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: It is the only active full-contract loop still red, and the new checker honesty makes that gap explicit rather than hidden.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Marketing will stop reporting faux progress and will only return green once research input, action execution, and independent verification all line up.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep registry ownership and job-coverage gates current as new system-owned Gateway jobs appear
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This run repaired live topology drift, but the protection only stays valuable if the registry remains the maintained source of truth.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Future loops will not escape architecture accounting or monitoring coverage by accident.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Harden any remaining checker surfaces that can still ignore red runner or verifier signals
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The marketing checker showed how easy it is for a green substring to survive after the real loop is red.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Less hidden self-certification and faster fail-closed diagnosis across the runtime.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Added explicit ownership for the live docs supervisor, expanded the marketing stack ownerCronJobs to cover the full active marketing topology, and registered the active research-findings and mirror-sync support loops.
Added a fail-closed gateway-job-registry-coverage invariant so enabled architecture-scoped jobs cannot hide outside the registry.
Expanded KEY_JOBS to watch the previously uncovered active jobs marketing-research-daily, marketing-daily, and Push research findings to git repo.
Removed the fake-green path by making the checker fail when the runner bundle is red or the momentum watchdog is not healthy.

independent_verification.summary: Fresh post-repair verification confirms the ownership/coverage and checker-honesty repairs. Marketing independent verification still fails for substantive reasons, so the overall architecture remains only mostly healthy.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: The marketing owner loop itself still needs a fresh passing independent verification artifact after substantive repair; current verdict remains fail.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: The marketing loop is now truthfully red across checker, runner, momentum, and independent verification surfaces
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: That is the clearest remaining gap between having a self-improving owner loop and actually recovering from its failing signals.
